hooks.command: node -e "const i = JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || '{}'); const p = i.file_path || ''; if (p.includes('package-lock.json')) { console.error('BLOCK: package-lock.json no debe editarse manualmente. Usa npm install.'); process.exit(1); } process.exit(0);"

node -e "const i = JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || '{}'); const p = i.file_path || ''; if (!p.match(/\.(ts|tsx)$/)) process.exit(0); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('npm run lint --workspace=packages/library -- --fix --quiet', { cwd: 'E:/Work/void-ui', stdio: 'pipe' }); } catch(e) { const out = e.stdout?.toString() || ''; const err = e.stderr?.toString() || ''; console.log(out.split('\n').slice(-8).join('\n')); } process.exit(0);"
